_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Data science involves examining data through statistical analysis and data mining, to identify patterns and uncover insights that can inform decision-making.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data literacy concepts, including reading and interpreting charts, understanding data sources, recognizing misleading visualizations, and applying basic statistical reasoning.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-K-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-S-005 (AI, cosine: 0.508), DG-K-001 (DG, cosine: 0.495).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.521). Shared vocabulary: [data, statistical]. DDaT-only terms [analysis, decision, examining, identify, inform, insights] vs WIDAI-only terms [applying, basic, charts, concepts, interpreting, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.873 (P=0.878, R=0.869). Balanced P/R — the 21-word DDaT element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.4%). "Data science involves examining data through statistical analysis and data minin" and "Knowledge of data literacy concepts, including reading and interpreting charts," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.578 > STS 0.521 (gap +0.056). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data, statistical] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.6%. Shared tokens: [data, statistical]. DDaT-only: [analysis, decision, examining, identify, inform, insights]. WIDAI-only: [applying, basic, charts, concepts, interpreting, knowledge].
